productDisplayName: Tokyo Talkies Women Grey Melange Top
description: Style Note We like our clothes to make a statement. Make a casually confident one with this simple and well fitted top. Pair it with jeans or shorts and wear a comfortable pair of flip flops to carry off the look completely. Product Details A purple and grey top with horizontal, alternate stripes of purple and grey, a round neck with a slightly gathered flare in the middle and short raglan sleeves Material and Care 100% cotton Wash using mild detergent Do not dry in direct sunlight Do not bleach Do not iron directly on print or embroidery Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
